crm1.title: CRM 1
crm1.description: Complete CRM module to centralize customer relationships, track opportunities, and structure commercial activity.

crm2.title: CRM 2
crm2.description: Complete CRM module to centralize customer relationships, track opportunities, and structure commercial activity.

shop.description: E-commerce suite to manage product catalogs, orders, payments, and sales performance.

recruit.title: Recruit Principal
recruit.description: Recruitment workspace to publish job offers, qualify applications, and manage interviews efficiently.

school.title: School Principal
school.description: School module to organize classes, plan lessons, and monitor learner progress.

about.title: About
about.description: Discover Bro World, our mission, our vision, and our commitments.

hero.title: Building a reliable and human-centered experience
hero.subtitle: Bro World helps teams coordinate operations, share knowledge, and speed up decision-making.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Enable every team to improve operational clarity with simple and connected tools.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: Create a digital environment where information flows quickly, stays reliable, and empowers collaboration.

impact.title: Real impact
impact.description: Every feature must deliver measurable value to daily workflows.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: We prioritize transparency, security, and service continuity.

innovation.title: Useful innovation
innovation.description: We continuously improve the experience without adding complexity.

ops.quote: We reduced coordination time by 30% by centralizing conversations in Bro World.
ops.author: Operations Manager · Industrial sector

community.quote: The platform is clear, fast, and helps us respond quicker to our community.
community.author: Support Lead · International organization

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Find quick answers to common questions about the platform.

hero.title: An enriched FAQ to move faster
hero.subtitle: Filter by category, search specific topics, and quickly access the right contact channel.

q1.question: How do I sign in to my account?
q1.answer: Use your username or email on the Login page, then enter your password.

q2.question: Can I customize notifications?
q2.answer: Yes, notifications can be adjusted in your user settings for each channel.

q3.question: How is my data protected?
q3.answer: Data is encrypted in transit and access is controlled through roles and permissions.

q4.question: Is the platform available in multiple languages?
q4.answer: Yes, you can change the interface language directly from the top navigation bar.

contactCta.title: Still missing an answer?
contactCta.description: Our support team can guide you to the best solution for your context.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Need help or have feedback? Reach out through one of our channels.

hero.title: A clear contact point for every need
hero.subtitle: Our teams reply according to priority level with transparent service commitments.

request.title: Request received
request.description: Immediate automated acknowledgment with a tracking number.

response.title: First response
response.description: Under 2 business hours for high-priority tickets.

resolution.title: Resolution plan
resolution.description: Regular updates until full ticket resolution.
